title: Max Fashion is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Max Fashion is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
